'''Cobb Salfur''' was a [[Scout/Legends|scout]] and roughneck from [[Ovise III]]. He was a member of the [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] [[Endor strike team/Legends|commando]] team. After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] hired him to keep watch on Endor. Salfur proceeded to build a [[Salfur's Trading Post|trading post]] on the forest [[Moon/Legends|moon]].<ref name="Geo" />
